rationale: No qualitative change for Romania this cycle — Iran deal uncertainty continues to affect energy prices; regional security situation unchanged; other headlines are distant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A resolved Iran deal could lower energy costs for Romania, but Tehran's denial means continued uncertainty in gas and oil markets affecting Romanian households.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon adds instability to the broader Middle East, with indirect effects on energy markets relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: new rules and rival marches in Rome
top_events.summary: EU migration policy discussions remain relevant to Romania given migration flows from Ukraine and Moldova, but no new binding decisions this cycle.
